headline: Constellation Brands heads into earnings with demand headwinds
summary: Constellation Brands Inc (NYSE:STZ) reports fiscal first-quarter results after the close on June 30, and the setup is bumpy. UBS is modeling EPS of $3.12, below the Street consensus of $3.24, after cutting estimates to reflect weaker beer demand. The stock has dropped 11.4% in recent...
